title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at upGrad Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at upGrad Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? upGrad Asia Pacific Associates in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad Asia Pacific Associates:
upGrad Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad Asia Pacific Associates!
